title: Swing trade recommendations
author: Adventurous_Chart360
selftext: I have created the tool to scan the US stocks with a market cap of over 300M and average daily volume of over 2M using Finviz screener(~1300 stocks) and then I run them through 31 strategies and complex rules to come up with a weighted score and daily recommendation for swing trade. I run this job at the end of the market and creates your picks for the next day. Check out https://tradebotengine.com
